sentence_reviews.text: A vector-retrieval service operationalizes embedding generation, indexing, metadata filtering, approximate search, reranking, freshness, and access control.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: ANN source supports approximate indexing/search; DDIA supports operational service concerns, but metadata filtering, reranking, freshness, and access control are not all directly evidenced.
sentence_reviews.notes: Needs a vector-search service or RAG infrastructure source for the full definition.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Vector-search and retrieval services is to connect Vector databases & ANN indexes, Hybrid retrieval & reranking to downstream capabilities including Neural search, RAG & question answering.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Sources support ANN and information systems broadly; downstream RAG/QA linkage is graph-derived.
sentence_reviews.notes: Plausible atlas positioning, not direct evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Neural search, RAG & question answering
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: ANN and AI references support retrieval concepts; RAG and QA substrate claim is not directly sourced.
sentence_reviews.notes: Defensible but should add a RAG/neural search source.

sentence_reviews.text: combined with Vector databases & ANN indexes
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: ANN indexes and operational data systems support the combination concept.

sentence_reviews.text: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Vector databases & ANN indexes, Hybrid retrieval & reranking.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: DDIA supports operational failure concerns generally; exact limitation list and dependency sentence are template/graph-derived.
sentence_reviews.notes: Numerical behavior and retrieval-quality failure modes need more specific evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: Vector-search and retrieval services turns Vector databases & ANN indexes into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: ANN and data-system sources support the conceptual relationship.
sentence_reviews.notes: Core dependency is defensible; exact rationale is templated.

sentence_reviews.text: Vector-search and retrieval services turns Hybrid retrieval & reranking into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Sources support retrieval/search concepts, but not hybrid reranking service operationalization directly.
sentence_reviews.notes: Core relationship is plausible but needs a hybrid retrieval/reranking citation.

sentence_reviews.text: Vector-search and retrieval services turns Distributed systems & networking into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: DDIA supports distributed operational concerns for services, but vector retrieval linkage is indirect.
sentence_reviews.notes: Common dependency is plausible for production retrieval services.

edge_reviews.notes: Vector databases/ANN indexes are central to a vector retrieval service.
Reranking is a common retrieval-service stage, but direct citation is missing.
Distributed systems are a plausible common dependency for operational retrieval services.
